debug_info.goal:
n : ↑(Set.Ioi 1)
⊢ IsLeast
    {k |
      ∀ (A B : IMO2020P4.Company (↑n) k),
        ∃ i j, IMO2020P4.Company.linked (↑n) k A i j ∧ IMO2020P4.Company.linked (↑n) k B i j}
    (IMO2020P4.answer n)

failed_attempts:
have hn : 1 < (↑n : ℕ) := n.prop
  constructor
  · -- Upper bound: answer n ∈ S
    intro A B; exact upper_bound hn A B
  · -- Lower bound: ∀ k ∈ S, answer n ≤ k
    intro k hk
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hk
    by_contra h; push_neg at h; simp only [answer] at h
    have hk_le : k ≤ (↑n : ℕ) * ((↑n : ℕ) - 1) := by omega
    obtain ⟨A, B, hAB⟩ := lower_bound hn
    have hS := S_upward_closed' hk_le hk
    obtain ⟨i, j, hA, hB⟩ := hS A B
    exact hAB i j ⟨hA, hB⟩
